name: contentful-migrator
description: Extract Contentful entries with linked references, store locally, recreate selectively in another space

scripts.help:
echo '
  === EXTRACT (download to local) ===
  extract          Default: unlimited depth, skips page nav links
  extract:shallow  Depth 1 — root + direct children only
  extract:medium   Depth 3 — 3 levels of nesting
  extract:deep     Depth 5 — 5 levels of nesting
  extract:full     Unlimited depth, NO skip (traverses everything)
    --entry <id> [--name <name>] [--space <alias>] [--depth N] [--skip-types x,y] [--no-skip]

  === CREATE (from local to target) ===
  create               Create new entries, skip those already in remap
  create:force         Ignore remap — create everything fresh (new IDs)
  create:update        Overwrite existing entries in-place (auto-creates if deleted)
  create:force-update  Overwrite existing + create all unmapped
  create:with-assets   Create entries + migrate referenced assets from source
  create:preview       Dry run — see what would happen
    --name <extraction> | --entries <id1,id2> [--space <alias>] [--with-assets] [--publish]

  === MIGRATE (direct source → target, no local storage) ===
  migrate              Direct migrate, depth 1 (root + children)
  migrate:solo         Direct migrate, depth 0 (root entry only)
  migrate:with-assets  Migrate entries + transfer assets with dedup
  migrate:preview      Dry run — see what would be migrated
    --entry <id> [--source <alias>] [--target <alias>] [--depth N] [--with-assets] [--force] [--publish]

  === CREATE CONTENT (schema-driven content authoring) ===
  generate-schemas      Pull content type schemas from Contentful API
  create-content        Create entries from a content spec JSON
  create-content:preview  Dry run — see what would be created
    --spec <path.json> [--space <alias>] [--publish]

  === TRANSFORM (agentic bulk field updates via JSON spec) ===
  transform        Run a transform spec file against live Contentful
  transform:preview  Dry run — see what would change
    --spec <path.json> [--publish]

  === LOCALE ===
  locale           Bulk copy locale fields on existing entries (same space)
  locale:preview   Dry run — see what would change without writing
    --from <locale> --to <locale> + scope: --name <extraction> | --type <contentType> | --entries <id1,id2> | --all
    [--space <alias>] [--overwrite] [--publish]

  === INSPECT (live entry metadata) ===
  inspect          Fetch sys metadata from live Contentful (dates, versions, status)
    --entry <id> [--space <alias>]

  === OTHER ===
  list             Overview of catalog, extractions, remap
  help             This message
'
